vibe_description: A manic scientist throwing volatile potions and mixing chemicals on the fly. You solve problems with explosions and experimental mutagens.
The mad scientist who replaces a missing arm with a cannon. You solve every problem with a spell, a schematic, and an aggressively large wrench.
Pure, unfiltered rage translated into physical form. You don't need fancy armor because your sheer anger allows you to shrug off being set on fire.
The chaotic catalyst of the group. You weaponize charisma, playing a lute and cracking jokes while convincing dragons to fight each other.
The responsible lifeline who keeps everyone from dying. You are a holy powerhouse heavily armed with healing magic and unwavering devotion.
The ultimate nature lover who can (and will) turn into a grizzly bear to solve your problems. You commune with mushrooms and the forest floor.
Chosen directly by the gods without needing to study holy books. You effortlessly channel divine magic with an angelic grace and a heavy weapon.
The ultimate master of combat. Whether you prefer a massive greatsword or a tactical bow, you hit harder and swing more times than anyone else.
A zen martial artist dodging traps and catching arrows. Your hands are lethal weapons, and you move across the battlefield like a breeze.
The righteous crusader with a glowing sword and uncompromising morals. You specialize in massive critical hits and tanking hits for your squishier friends.
The wilderness survivalist who never gets lost. You are the master of tracking targets, sniping from the shadows, and bonding with magical beasts.
The stealthy opportunist who can pick any lock and dodge any fireball. You prefer to hide in the darkness and strike precisely when the enemy least expects it.
Raw, chaotic magic bubbling inside your blood. You don't study spells; you simply alter reality through sheer force of personality.
You made a pact with an otherworldly entity for power, and now you have to pay the cosmic bills. Your combat style revolves around casting your favorite magical blast over and over.
The consummate academic who memorized the entire library. You spend weeks preparing the perfect spell, but panic the moment someone takes a swing at you.
A devout holy warrior who channels divine wrath through their bare fists. You deliver literal right hooks of righteous judgment.
A sinister cleric who rejected the light to preach heresy. You weaponize shadows, curses, and the inevitable chill of undeath.
A tempestuous performer whose melodies summon thunderclaps and lightning. Your music doesn't just soothe the soul; it tears down buildings.
A druid who embraces the toxic, decaying, and poisonous side of nature. You control swarms, rot, and the fungal collapse of your enemies.
A spellcaster who literally wore a fiendish entity's skin to gain forbidden power. Your vibe is high-risk, terrifying, and deeply unnatural.
A grim ranger who stalks prey in the deepest subterranean caverns. You are the ultimate underground assassin, striking from total darkness.
A commanding tactician who fights with the terrifying presence and overwhelming majesty of a true dragon. You dominate the battlefield through fear.
An unpredictable caster playing Russian roulette with reality. Your spell might vaporize the boss, or it might turn your entire party pink.
A warrior slowly transforming into a dragon from the inside out. You grow scales, breathe fire, and slowly lose your human limits.
A mischievous thief who uses illusions and invisible magic hands to pick pockets from across the room. You are annoying, elusive, and deadly.
